productDisplayName: SDL by Sweet Dreams Women Pink & Purple Night suits
description: Style NotePerfect to slip into on a lazy day, to wear at a girly pyjama party or just for after-hours at home, these pyjama sets from SDL Loungewear instantly transport you to a world of calm. Crafted from soft cotton in pretty and feminine styles, they offer exemplary comfort and a flattering Fit.Product DetailsBaby pink pyjama top has a round slit neckline with purple pom-pom lace edging, short puffed sleeves, yoke with embroidery and gathers in the middle, vents and embroidery at the hem with piping in purpleMatching full-length pyjama bottoms in purple, elasticated waist with drawstrings, pockets on the sidesMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmDo not bleach, dry clean or iron on decoration or printTumble dry, normal, low heatIron low and dry in shade   Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing size M
